compiled_state.title: Update title-length-validator to guard v3 path instead of v2 path
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update title-length-validator.sh to guard the v3 event-sourced path instead of the v2 flat-file path.

## What to change

File: plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh

1. Update the path guard (line ~45):
   BEFORE: if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *"/.tickets/"* ]]; then exit 0; fi
   AFTER: Update to match the v3 ticket event directory path

2. Update the header comment (lines 4, 11) to reference the v3 path instead of the v2 path.

## Rationale
The title-length-validator enforces Jira's 255-char limit on ticket titles. With v2 cleanup, .tickets/ no longer exists. The hook should guard the v3 path so title enforcement still works for v3 ticket writes (if any Write/Edit tool calls target that path). If the v3 system never exposes ticket titles via Write/Edit tool calls (they go through the CLI), document why and remove the guard entirely — but default to updating the path to maintain the invariant.

## TDD Requirement
Failing tests from task 014f-a652 must be green after this change.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] title-length-validator.sh no longer contains the v2 path guard pattern
  Verify: ! grep -q "'/\.tickets/'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh

- [ ] title-length-validator.sh contains a path guard for the v3 event-sourced path OR a documented justification for removing the guard entirely
  Verify: grep -q 'tickets-tracker\|No path guard needed' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh

- [ ] RED test from task 014f-a652 (test_title_length_validator_v3_path_guarded) now passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-title-length-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS' || grep -rq 'test_title_length_validator_v3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: task complete, committed in batch 9
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
